_comment: Index of JSON Schema files for Nielsoln Rescue Toolkit module log outputs. Schema format: JSON Schema draft-07. All schemas use additionalProperties:true to allow forward-compatible new fields.

m01_persistence_scan.notes: Each line is one finding object. Validate line-by-line.

m05_disk_health.notes: Top-level is a JSON array, one object per block device.

m09_thermal_health.notes: Schema title: THERMAL_ANALYSIS. Adds idle_snapshot and thermal_response_test blocks (idle/peak/recovery temps, time-to-peak, freq before/during/after, throttling, emergency_stop, confidence).

m17_system_summary.notes: sections object includes: hardware, disk, thermal (legacy/passive v1), thermal_analysis (preferred v2 with active response test), clamav, clamav_confidence, logon, persistence, services, software, upgrade, system_integrity, execution_surface, device_manager (adds missing_drivers/disabled_devices/problem_code_devices/missing_driver_files/old_drivers/unsigned_drivers), cmos_health, storage_usage, disk_integrity, bad_sector_scan (adds risk_status/confidence/limitations).

m25_event_archive.notes: Run summary: single JSON file per run. Chunk lines: JSONL, validate each line separately.

m27_device_manager.notes: Schema title: DEVICE_MANAGER_FULL_STATUS. Adds service binding, driver files, compatible IDs, filter chains, decoded config flags/problem codes, present/disabled flags, System.evtx driver event correlation.

m33_bad_sector_scan.notes: Schema title: BAD_SECTOR_SCAN. Read-only bad-sector/slow-read test. Fields: scan_scope (device_size_bytes, sector_size_bytes, start_lba, end_lba, total_lba_count, sampled_fraction, full_scan), physical_device, partition_device, partition_offset_lba, windows_volume, filesystem, scan_mode, block_size_bytes, sectors_attempted/read_ok/failed/slow, bad_ranges, slow_read_ranges, safety (read_only, destructive, write_test_performed, stop_reasons), scan_status (completed/interrupted/error/skipped), verdict (v1: HEALTHY/MARGINAL/FAILING/CRITICAL/UNKNOWN; v2: OK/SLOW_READS/BAD_SECTORS_FOUND/SCAN_INCOMPLETE/UNSAFE_TO_SCAN/UNKNOWN), risk_status (v2 normalised), confidence, limitations, clone_recommended, ddrescue_command.
